zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Keith於1319年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire奧特豪斯時，她的父親John Keith Marischal of Scotland25歲，母親Isabella de Soulis43歲。她於1330年與Sir Malcolm Fleming在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1380年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Keith于1319年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire奧特豪斯时，她的父亲John Keith Marischal of Scotland25岁，母亲Isabella de Soulis43岁。她于1330年与Sir Malcolm Fleming在英国苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1380年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Keith was born in 1319, in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, her father, John Keith Marischal of Scotland, was 25 and her mother, Isabella de Soulis, was 43. She married Sir Malcolm Fleming in 1330, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1380, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina Keith est née en 1319, à Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, John Keith Marischal of Scotland, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Soulis, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Malcolm Fleming en 1330, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christina Keith 1319 in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Keith Marischal of Scotland 25 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Soulis 43. Sie hat 1330 in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Malcolm Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Keith è nata il nel 1319 nel Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Keith Marischal of Scotland, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Soulis, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sir Malcolm Fleming nel 1330, nel Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1380, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christina Keithが1319年にスコットランドForfarshireアウチテローウゼで生まれた時，父John Keith Marischal of Scotlandは25歳，母Isabella de Soulisは43歳であった。1330年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアでSir Malcolm Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1380年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christina Keith(이)가 1319년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 오트하스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Keith Marischal of Scotland(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Soulis(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1330년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Sir Malcolm Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Keith nasceu em 1319, em Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Keith Marischal of Scotland, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Soulis, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Malcolm Fleming em 1330, em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Keith родилась в 1319 г. в местности аучтироус, Forfarshire, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Keith Marischal of Scotland было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Soulis, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Malcolm Fleming в 1330 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christina Keith nació en 1319, en Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, su papá, John Keith Marischal of Scotland, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabella de Soulis, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sir Malcolm Fleming en 1330, en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1380, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años.
